full_text: Shaheen Afridi to Finn Allen, Lbw!! Another lbw appeal, once again given out. And, Finn Allen has a word with his partner before signalling 'T'. No bat involved. Over to ball-tracking and it's New Zealand lose Finn Allen as well as a review. 136kph, full and swinging in, a shuffling Finn Allen tries to flick and plays all around it. Didn't account for the swing and got pinned on the front leg adjacent to the sticks. Ball-tracking showed it to be hitting middle and leg. Eventful start to the first semifinal and Pakistan have the early breakthrough. Shaheen Afridi was pumped up and had his arms aloft.
